title: More War-Driven Inflation Seen in Fed’s Favored Gauge
summary: The Federal Reserve’s favored top-line inflation gauge is rapidly approaching 4% as a war-driven spike in energy costs generates unease that price pressures will broaden.

title: Hungary’s New Premier Warns Predecessor Left Budget ‘Skeletons’
summary: Hungary’s new Prime Minister Peter Magyar said he was hoping for economic growth of about 2% this year but put voters on notice that the state of public finances left by his predecessor made it impossible to make firm forecasts.

title: Exelixis: Financial Performance Improves Faster Than Market Expectations

title: Chanel’s Mega Dividend Brings Owners’ Windfall to $21B
summary: The billionaire family behind Chanel is on track to pocket at least $21 billion from payouts over the past decade, a huge windfall as their brand prospers during a downturn hitting some luxury-good rivals. Angelina Rascouet joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sprott Rare Earths Ex-China ETF: A Laser-Focused Pure Play On REEs
Uber Proposes Delivery Hero Takeover at €10 Billion Valuation
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has offered to take over Delivery Hero SE in a deal that would value the German delivery company at about €10 billion ($11.6 billion) as it seeks to ramp up competition with DoorDash Inc. outside the US.
